regime_note: lem:m2 confinement needs m > 2n; exp/174 uses m=n (full support, no confinement) and B independent of A (closed conditional cell, not the open marginal-adaptive corner).
verdict: 174's measurement is correct but its independence finding is FORCED by the ensemble (P(C|B) identical for all B); noise side of lem:m2 remains OPEN and untouched.
